case_title: SPENGEL, JUSTINE A. VS CCSF:RECREATION&PARK DEPT./ATTN:MARIANNE BERTUCEL- et al

docket_entries.description: PLFDCL:FILED CLAIM AGAINST CITY&WAS DENIED.SEEK RE MEDY FROM THE COURT.HOUSE BURNED DOWN,ALL RECORDS DESTROYED.
DISMISSAL IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, ENTERED ON OCT. 17,1997, IS SET ASIDE AND VACATED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SPENGEL, JUSTINE A. AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF:RECREATION&PARK DEPT./ATTN:MARIANNE BERTUCEL- ATTN: BETTY LIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-26-1997, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-09-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPENGEL, JUSTINE A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CCSF:RECREATION&PARK DEPT./ATTN:MARIANNE BERTUCEL- ATTN: BETTY LIM NO PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM LATE CLAIM EVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WITH THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER: HAVING CONSIDERED THE DEF. CCSF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION & GOOD CAUSE APPEARING. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT: THE JUDGMENT OF -

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF:RECREATION&PARK DEPT./ATTN:MARIANNE BERTUCEL- ATTN: BETTY LIM NO PETION FOR RELIEF FROM LATE CLAIM EVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WITH THE COURT. NUNC PRO TUNC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

REM: DEF'S EXPARTE APPLICATION WITHDRAWING ITS OBJECTION TO JURISDICTION BASED ON PNTF'S FAILURE TO FILE A TIMELY CLAIM, AND ORDER
